title: Itabashi Area Guide
summary: Itabashi can be a balanced choice for newcomers who want lower rent pressure than central hubs while keeping access to Ikebukuro and central Tokyo.
recommendedFor: new residents who want lower rent than central hubs
commuters to Ikebukuro or central Tokyo
people who prefer local shopping streets
warnings: Check which train line is closest before signing.
Commute comfort differs a lot by station.
Some areas feel residential and quiet while others are busy.
notes: Do not judge the whole ward by one station; train line, local shopping street, and walking route matter a lot.
Rent is still shaped by building age, station distance, and room layout, so compare multiple stations.
Commute comfort should be checked against your actual workplace or school, not only map distance.
